title: FREE Online Workshop - Easy Traveler’s Notebook Techniques!
excerpt: I’m so excited to announce my FREE live online workshop - Easy Traveler’s Notebook Techniques ! You guys know how much I LOVE TNs! I wanna share some of my tips and tricks with you! In this LIVE ONLINE workshop,…
body:
I’m so excited to announce my FREE live online workshop - Easy Traveler’s Notebook Techniques! You guys know how much I LOVE TNs! I wanna share some of my tips and tricks with you! 

In this LIVE ONLINE workshop, you’ll learn several of my favorite EASY techniques for preserving your memories in a traveler’s notebook all using the scrapbooking supplies you already have!

This ONLINE workshop is scheduled for Tuesday, August 18th @ 1:00 pm PST.

Click here to register! I can’t wait to see you there! 

Space is limited so register as soon as you can!

Register Now
